name: Frontend Quality Pack
description: Build, verify, and optimize user-facing interfaces with UI engineering, accessibility, browser evidence, and performance checks.
useCases: Verify frontend changes across responsive layouts, browser behavior, interaction states, and visual polish before merge.
Audit accessibility coverage for keyboard flows, labels, focus order, contrast, motion, and screen reader behavior.
Use browser evidence and screenshots to catch regressions that unit tests or static review would miss.
Review performance risks in user-facing flows, including loading paths, bundle impact, rendering cost, and perceived speed.
examplePrompts: Run a frontend quality review for this change, covering responsive states, interaction states, accessibility, and visual regressions.
Audit this UI for accessibility issues and propose the smallest fixes for keyboard, focus, labels, contrast, and semantics.
Create a browser verification plan with viewports, test data, screenshots, console checks, and release-blocking failures.
Review this frontend flow for performance risk, including bundle impact, rendering bottlenecks, loading UX, and measurement steps.
